_meta.dataSource: Static analysis via Glob/Grep/Read of frontend/src/
_meta.scope: WCAG AA compliance + state coverage audit

criticalIssues.issue: No prefers-reduced-motion support across entire codebase
criticalIssues.fix: Add @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { *, *::before, *::after { animation-duration: 0.01ms !important; transition-duration: 0.01ms !important; } } to globals.css. Wrap Framer Motion with useReducedMotion() hook.
Audit all <button> with only icon children; add aria-label describing action. ApplyModal.tsx already does this correctly — use as reference.

criticalIssues.issue: Modal focus trap incomplete in ApplyModal
criticalIssues.fix: Replace custom modal with Radix Dialog primitive — auto focus trap, restore-focus on close, escape handler, scroll lock. Already planned in Design System Scout report.

majorIssues.issue: Hardcoded text color contrast likely fails WCAG AA
majorIssues.fix: Token --t1 (#9494B0) on --bg-2 (#13131E) needs verification — likely ~4.3:1 (borderline). --t2 (#55556A) on --bg-0 (#07070D) almost certainly fails (~2.9:1). Brighten --t1 to #B0B0CC and --t2 to #7A7A95 OR restrict --t2 to large text 18px+ only.

majorIssues.issue: Missing label-input associations on form pages
majorIssues.fix: Replace implicit labels with shadcn FormLabel htmlFor=... + id on input. Migration to shadcn Form (RHF wrapper) handles this automatically.
Add aria-label={`${count} thông báo chưa đọc`} to the button. Use sr-only span to describe '99+' = 99 or more unread notifications.

majorIssues.issue: div with onClick handlers without keyboard support
majorIssues.fix: Replace with react-dropzone (already in scope per design-system report) which provides role='button' tabIndex={0} and keyboard support out of box.

minorIssues.issue: No retry mechanism UI for upload errors
minorIssues.fix: Add Retry button in error state component with onClick → re-trigger upload mutation.
Standardize ApiError → ErrorState component with offline icon + retry CTA. Use TanStack Query isError + error.message for distinct messages.

minorIssues.issue: Small text tokens (11px, 10px) used heavily on mobile without responsive scaling
files: multiple — globals.css base font + badge/meta text
minorIssues.fix: Use fluid clamp() — clamp(11px, 1.6vw, 13px) for meta text. Avoid <12px on mobile (WCAG 1.4.4 spirit).

wcagViolations.issue: div with onClick acting as button — not focusable, no Enter/Space handler
No prefers-reduced-motion gate on any animation

contrastChecks.note: Passes AA but close to threshold — brighten for safety margin
Restrict to large text only (18pt+) or brighten to #7A7A95
Borderline for body text — use only for headings or with bold weight

responsiveGaps.issue: No mobile collapsed-card alternative — horizontal scroll only
Sample not yet read — likely table-heavy without mobile alternative
Sidebar nav lacks mobile drawer trigger pattern — fixed sidebar may overlap content on small screens
